title: Persona documentation for system building context
description: Created reusable 'Vibe Builder' persona document that consolidates architectural principles, anti-patterns, and system knowledge into a compact, loadable reference for future system building work
context: User requested persona instruction set to help AI operate more intuitively when building on the platform. Synthesized lessons from architectural principles, N5 refactor patterns, and lessons system into single reference document.
outcome: Created 5,452-character persona document at Documents/System/vibe_builder_persona.md. Document provides: pre-flight checklist, critical principles (Rule-of-Two, anti-patterns), script templates, architecture overview, troubleshooting patterns, and quality checklists. Enables faster context loading for system work.
